citation: Freddie SF Seller/Servicer Guide §4203.4 (common case: matches Fannie at top tier)
comment: Hand-calc: credit_score=740 -> '740-or-better'; LTV=80 -> '75.01-80'; primary, purchase, 1-unit. Base eligible=true, credit_fee_bps=0 + 0 + 0 + 0 = 0 bps. Same outcome as Fannie at this cell -- confirms the GSEs converge on top-tier eligibility per RESEARCH §RUL-03.
